basic_details.job_title: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Patna has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: JRF: Max 32 years for M.Tech, Max 28 years for B.Tech/B.Sc(Engg.)/M.Sc.
age_limit.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Maximum 32 years for M.Tech. Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Maximum 28 years for B.Tech/B.Sc(Engg.)/M.Sc. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC/women/PD candidates will receive age relaxation as per GOI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./B.Tech./M.Sc. (Electrical/Electronics/Communication/Instrumentation/Computer Science & Engineering) with GATE score and minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% (for M.Tech) or 7.5 or 70% (for B.Tech/M.Sc). B.Tech from IITs with min CPI 7.5 are exempted from GATE. Exceptional candidates with M.Tech and 2 years experience may be offered SRF directly.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M. Tech. (VLSI/Embedded System/Microelectronics/ Electronics System/Communication System/Instrumentation and Computer Science Engineering) degree with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% of marks with qualified GATE Score (within last five years). B.Tech/B.Sc(Engg.)/M.Sc. (Electrical/Electronics/Communication/Instrumentation/ Computer Science& Engineering) degree with a minimum CPI of 7.5 or 70% of marks with qualified GATE Score within last five years. Experience: Exceptional candidates having M. Tech degree and minimum two (02) years of relevant experience, may be offered SRF Position directly.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37000 Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 42000

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Patna Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Patna JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 07-08-2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Tech, B.Tech, or M.Sc. degree in relevant fields like Electrical, Electronics, Communication, Instrumentation, or Computer Science & Engineering, along with a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit is 32 years for M.Tech holders and 28 years for B.Tech/B.Sc(Engg.)/M.Sc. holders.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF and SRF positions?
faq.answer: The salary for a Junior Research Fellow (JRF) is Rs. 37,000 per month, and for a Senior Research Fellow (SRF), it is Rs. 42,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send a scanned copy of your application form and GATE score card along with your resume to the provided email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF role at IIT Patna?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a written test followed by a personal interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates with M.Tech and experience apply for an SRF position directly?
faq.answer: Yes, exceptional candidates with an M.Tech degree and a minimum of two years of relevant experience may be considered for a Senior Research Fellow (SRF) position directly.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Patna located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Patna is located in Patna, Bihar, with the pincode 801106.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is R&D/908/MEM/607.
